allow: Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=8 root@192.168.1.22 ' *)

Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.22 ' *)
Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.22 'mkdir -p /lib/firmware/meson/vdec')
